varieties.name: California Wonder
varieties.traits: Large, blocky, 4-lobed fruits 10-13cm long × 10cm wide
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick-walled (6mm+), sweet, crisp, dark green ripening to deep red

varieties.name: Yolo Wonder
varieties.origin: USA, 1952 (cross of California Wonder × Elephant Trunk)
varieties.traits: Large blocky fruits, 3-4 lobes, 10-11cm × 9-10cm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very thick walls, sweet, crisp, dark green to brilliant red
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy yields, abundant fruit set throughout season
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, Australian seed suppliers

varieties.name: King of the North
varieties.traits: Blocky 6" × 4" fruits, uniform, full-figured
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick walls, sweet, dark green to deep red
varieties.yield_notes: Very heavy producer, 8-10 peppers per plant
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers ship to Australia

varieties.name: Bull Nose
varieties.traits: Large blocky shape with distinctive crinkled 'nose' on blossom end

varieties.name: Yellow Bell
varieties.traits: Bell-shaped, up to 12cm, golden yellow color

varieties.name: Golden California Wonder
varieties.origin: USA, heirloom selection from California Wonder
varieties.traits: Large blocky gold fruits, same size as California Wonder
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick walls, exceptionally sweet, golden yellow

varieties.name: White Bell
varieties.traits: Bell-shaped, up to 10cm, creamy white turning pale yellow then red

varieties.name: Purple Beauty
varieties.traits: Deep purple/black exterior, lime green interior, 10cm fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick walls, tender-crisp, mild sweet flavor

varieties.name: Chocolate Beauty
varieties.traits: Deep chocolate/mahogany exterior with brick-red flesh

varieties.name: Mini Bell Red
varieties.traits: Small round fruits ~5cm, perfect snack size

varieties.name: Sweet Banana
varieties.traits: Long, slender, elongated fruits ~15cm, tapered shape
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick, mild-sweet, yellow turning to red when ripe
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, various Australian nurseries

varieties.name: Jimmy Nardello
varieties.traits: Long thin-skinned frying pepper, 25-30cm long, curved
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, rich flavor, bright red when ripe

varieties.name: Corno di Toro (Bull's Horn)
varieties.traits: Large conical 'bull's horn' shape, 15-20cm long, curved
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick walls, outstanding sweet flavor, green to shiny red

varieties.name: Warlock
varieties.traits: Large blocky fruits, dark green to deep red, very thick walls
varieties.availability: Seminis/Bayer commercial seed, Queensland agricultural suppliers

varieties.name: Arka Gaurav 🌱
varieties.origin: IIHR (Indian Institute of Horticultural Research), Bangalore, India
varieties.traits: Indeterminate variety, thick-fleshed, 130-150g average fruit weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark green to red, thick walls, excellent quality
varieties.availability: IIHR Bangalore, Kerala agricultural universities, Indian government seed programs

varieties.name: Arka Mohini 🌱
varieties.traits: Fruits turn red on ripening, 180-200g average weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very thick-fleshed, orange-red to red color

varieties.name: Arka Basant 🌱
varieties.traits: Erect fruits, cream-colored turning orange-red, square shape

varieties.name: Indra
varieties.traits: Long bushy plant, dense dark green foliage, 170g average fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very thick walls (1.05cm), dark green color, firm
varieties.availability: Syngenta India (Pune), Kerala agricultural suppliers, major seed dealers

varieties.name: Orobelle
varieties.traits: Square-shaped fruits, 150g average, yellow color
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick walls, golden yellow, premium quality

varieties.name: Bomby
varieties.traits: Long strong plant, good branching, 130-150g fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark green turning red at maturity, thick-walled

varieties.name: Natasha
varieties.traits: Yellow variety, excellent fruit quality
varieties.availability: Kerala polyhouse suppliers, major seed companies

varieties.name: Angel
varieties.traits: Premium quality fruits

varieties.name: NS-280
varieties.traits: Red-colored fruits

varieties.name: Red Knight
varieties.traits: Large blocky red fruits

varieties.name: Yolo Wonder
varieties.traits: Large thick-walled blocky fruits

varieties.name: King of the North
varieties.traits: Blocky fruits, cold-tolerant

varieties.name: Royal Wonder
varieties.traits: Green colored capsicum

varieties.name: PSM-1
varieties.traits: Heat-tolerant breeding line
varieties.availability: PAU Ludhiana, Kerala agricultural research stations

varieties.name: Green Gold
varieties.traits: Green variety

varieties.name: Sunbell
varieties.traits: Yellow variety

varieties.name: Bharat 🧬
varieties.traits: Green and red fruits
